Refer to Jeppesen GSPRM Training Route Manual - Chart "E LO 2".
The following bearing and distance information obtained from SPIJKERBOOR VOR/DME (SPY, N52° 32' E004° 51’) is given:

Radial: 334°
Distance: 47 NM

Find the current position of the aircraft.
note: slant range corrections should be ignored.
